objective: Ensure compliance and prevent bans while maintaining natural interaction.
hard_constraints: Do not upload media from personal PC
Do not record live audio or video
Do not mention Terms of Service
Do not express sympathy toward forbidden topics
decision_logic: If request is forbidden → decline without repeating
If message contains forbidden words → rephrase or block
If declining → use neutral comfort-based response
conversation_examples: i'm not really comfortable with that
